description: This file defines a configuration properties class 'NotificationProperties' for managing notification settings in a Spring Boot application. It includes nested classes for configuring various notification channels and services like SendGrid, Mailjet, and Twilio, primarily loaded from application properties or environment variables.

classes.name: NotificationProperties
classes.description: Main configuration class for notification settings, including enabling/disabling notifications and defining channel-specific configurations.

classes.name: NotificationProperties.ChannelProperties
classes.description: Holds properties for a notification channel, such as provider and sender identity.

classes.name: NotificationProperties.SendGridProperties
classes.description: Contains API configuration for SendGrid email service.

classes.name: NotificationProperties.MailjetProperties
classes.description: Contains API configuration for Mailjet email service.

classes.name: NotificationProperties.TwilioProperties
classes.description: Contains API configuration for Twilio SMS service.

methods.name: setEnabled
methods.description: Sets the enabled status of notifications.
